reasoning: Without access to search capabilities to verify the September 2025 FOMC decision, I must rely on the ex-ante base rate of this specific sequence of three policy moves (Cut in Sep, Pause in Oct, Pause in Dec). The chance of this exact sequence out of all possibilities is generally low (under 15%). If the Fed is in an easing cycle, a cut in September is frequently followed by another cut in December (which is an SEP meeting). A cut followed by two pauses would imply a sudden halt in easing. Therefore, I assign an ex-ante probability of 8%.
